name: Tomato and Cheese Tart
recipeIngredient: 2 cups tomatoes, peeled, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Roll out puff pastry to fit inside a 10-inch shallow tart pan.
3. Crimp edges and thoroughly prick the bottom of the shell with a fork.
4. In a small bowl, lightly beat eggs. Add cream and mix well.
5. Add melted butter, remaining ingredients, and adjust seasonings to taste.
6. Pour into the tart shell and bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until firm.
